title: task
description: dodag.rs:88-91 - ParentCandidate::path_cost() casts (link_etx * mhri as f32).round() as u16 without validating link_etx for NaN. In Rust, NaN as u16 produces 0, so path_cost returns just self.rank, treating a bad/invalid link as perfect (ETX=0). Failure: if link quality measurement produces NaN (e.g., div by zero in ETX calculation), the node may select a broken link as preferred parent because its path_cost is artificially low.
close_reason: Fixed: path_cost now checks for NaN/negative link_cost and saturates to u16::MAX, preventing invalid ETX values from making broken links appear optimal
